creator: michael.cress@cress.us
text: FreeBSD-11.0-STABLE-arm-armv6-RPI-B-20170105-r311441.img.xz causes a continuous reboot immediately after power-on of my Raspberry Pi Model B (original). This appears after the messages about uBoot/uEnv.txt. This did not occur with FreeBSD-11.0-STABLE-arm-armv6-RPI-B-20161209-r309771.img.xz. Unfortunately, the reboot happens so fast that I am unable to read the contents of the screen but cant tell that it dumps data in a somewhat tabular formatted fashion.
